hero.headline:
Give every guest a local insider —
without adding to your team's plate.
hero.subhead: Bell is an AI concierge that knows the North Fork by heart. Guests scan a code and instantly get recommendations, reservations, and answers — in their own language, any hour.
hero.trustLine: Built for hotels, inns, restaurants and wineries on the North Fork.

theShift.headline:
Your guests have questions around the clock.
Your team can't — and shouldn't have to.
theShift.body: "What time does the tasting room close?" "Where's a good dinner spot tonight?" "Is there an ice cream place nearby?" Great questions. Asked over and over. Bell handles them the moment they come up, so your front desk can focus on the moments that actually need a human touch.
theShift.pain1Body: The same dozen questions, every single day.
theShift.pain2Body: Guests still wonder at 11pm. No one's at the desk.
theShift.pain3Body: Guests leave without discovering the best of the area.

meetBell.headline: Not a chatbot. A concierge who actually knows the place.
meetBell.body: Bell speaks like a warm, well-traveled local — not a script. She remembers what your guests like, points them to the right tasting room, books the table, and plans the day. All in the look and feel of your property.

howItWorks.headline: Up and running in a weekend, not a quarter.
howItWorks.step1Body: Guests scan your Bell QR code — on the table, in the room, at the front desk. No app to download.
howItWorks.step2Body: From wine pairings to closing times to "surprise my partner." Bell answers instantly, in the guest's language.
howItWorks.step3Body: Bell books, recommends, and plans — so guests do more, spend more, and remember your place for it.

liveDemo.headline: This is what your guests will feel.
liveDemo.subhead: A real Bell conversation — try the suggestions below.
liveDemo.bellOpening: Hi, I'm Bell — your North Fork concierge. Ask me anything: wineries, happy hour, ice cream, or let me plan your day.

wineTasting.bellResponse: Great choice! The North Fork is wine country. I'd start with Bedell Cellars for their gorgeous views and approachable tastings, then head to Raphael for something more structured. Both are within 10 minutes. Want me to check their hours or help you plan the afternoon?

happyHour.bellResponse: Tonight's top pick: First and South in Greenport opens their patio at 4pm — half-price oysters and local draft beers until 6. The Frisky Oyster is a close second. Want directions or a table reservation?

romanticEvening.bellResponse: Lovely. Start with sunset oysters by the water, then a quiet table at a local favorite, and finish with a walk under the string lights. Want me to book the table?

iceCream.bellResponse: Scoops in Mattituck is the local favorite — homemade flavors, seasonal specials, and a line worth waiting in. Open until 9pm tonight. It's about 8 minutes from here. Want me to add it to your evening plan?

onlyBellKnows.headline: Local knowledge you won't find on a search engine.
onlyBellKnows.body: Bell is built on real, verified North Fork knowledge — the wineries worth the drive, the table with the sunset view, the happy hour that locals actually go to. Curated, current, and specific to where your guests are standing.

forGuests.headline: An effortless stay they'll talk about.
forGuests.card4Body: From a single dinner to a full day.
forGuests.card6Body: A scan, and Bell is right there.

humanPlusAI.headline:
Bell doesn't replace your team.
It gives them their time back.
humanPlusAI.body: The warmth of your staff is why guests come back. Bell takes the repetitive questions off their plate so they can do what machines can't — make people feel genuinely welcome. Better experience for guests. More breathing room for your team. More reasons to return.
humanPlusAI.pillar1Body: Every guest gets a concierge, not a queue.
humanPlusAI.pillar3Body: More bookings, more local spend, more loyalty.

forEstablishments.headline: Happier guests. Busier nights. A team that breathes.
forEstablishments.body: Bell turns guest curiosity into bookings and local spend — quietly, around the clock, in your brand's voice. You stay in control; Bell does the legwork.
forEstablishments.outcome2: Front desk freed from repetitive questions
forEstablishments.outcome3: A premium, modern touch guests notice
forEstablishments.outcome4: Set up fast, branded as yours

useCases.headline: Made for the places that make the North Fork.
useCases.case1Body: A concierge for every room, at scale.
useCases.case3Body: Menus, pairings and bookings, answered instantly.
useCases.case4Body: Tastings, hours and pairings your visitors will love.

socialProof.headline: Trusted by the places we partner with.

faq.headline: Good questions. Honest answers.
faq.q1: Does Bell replace my front desk staff?
faq.a1: No. Bell handles repetitive questions so your team can focus on real hospitality. It's a complement, not a replacement.
faq.a2: They scan a QR code — on the table, in the room, at the desk. No app to download.
faq.a3: English, Spanish and Portuguese today, with more on the way.
faq.a4: Most partners are live within days. We handle the heavy lifting.
faq.a5: Yes. Guest data is protected and never sold.
faq.a6: A simple recurring subscription. Let's find the right fit on a quick call.

finalCta.headline: Give your guests the North Fork — effortlessly.
finalCta.subhead: See Bell in your property in a 20-minute demo.
